tasks.label: Compile & Sign Current File
tasks.command: mkdir -p build/unsigned && ~/bin/jelly ${relativeFile} --export --out build/unsigned/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.shortcut && shortcuts sign --mode anyone --input build/unsigned/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.shortcut --output build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.shortcut && echo 'Signed: build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}.shortcut'

tasks.label: Compile & Sign All
tasks.command: mkdir -p build/unsigned && find . -name '*.jelly' -not -path './.git/*' | while read f; do name=$(basename "${f%.jelly}"); ~/bin/jelly "$f" --export --out "build/unsigned/$name.shortcut" && shortcuts sign --mode anyone --input "build/unsigned/$name.shortcut" --output "build/$name.shortcut" && echo "Signed: build/$name.shortcut"; done
